_scenario: UK domestic en-suite bathroom 2700×2100mm with bath+over-bath shower against the south wall. Exercises lighting-layout v1.6.0 Wave-1 cascade — both photometric_grid (INV-11) AND special_locations_zoning (INV-12) are required because room_type=bathroom is in the Part-7 set and mode=full_drawing. Producer-side cascade: special-locations/examples/cascade-lighting-layout-uk-bathroom emits the 5-zone payload + the 30 mA RCD blanket constraint per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701.411.3.3. Consumer-side INV-12 walks the 2 ceiling luminaires against payload.zones[] (point-in-polygon + height inclusion), verifies IP and voltage envelopes, and cascades the (empty) flag list.
_d5_retrofit_note: Retrofitted by D5 sprint 2026-06-04. v1.6.0 → v1.7.0: existing single zone Z2 defaults to purpose='circulation' per ZP-05 (BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.2.2 — a small domestic bathroom with no vanity anchor in inputs.anchor_fixtures is treated as a circulation/general-occupancy area; the plan-template vanity → task / entry → circulation split collapses onto a single circulation zone here because the scenario only has bath_1 + shower_1 anchors, no mirror/sink/vanity). em_target_lux=200 matches the v1.6.0 calculation_summary.target_illuminance_lux byte-identical (BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5 bathroom/washroom 200 lx entry). Both luminaires default to mount_type='recessed' per MT-01 (matches the 95 mm IPx4 LED recessed downlight). per_zone_achieved[] populated from existing achieved_illuminance_lux=254 lx (zone-level achievement equals room-level for single-zone rooms). Engineering content + INV-1..INV-12 unchanged; cascade payload (consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning.payload + consumed_intents.photometric_grid.payload) preserved byte-identical from C.2 producer (cascade-lighting-layout-uk-bathroom) and Part-7 photometric retrofit. Honest disclosure mirrored in output.calculation_summary.assumptions[], output.rationale.sections[] §v1.7 retrofit, and reasoning.md §D5.

photometric_ies_paths._source: Synthetic 95mm IPx4 LED recessed downlight, 1500 lm, 3000K, CRI 90, narrow-medium distribution per CIBSE LG7 §6.4. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3. Cascade reference for the lighting-layout consumer INV-11 walk; engineer-of-record substitutes manufacturer IES (e.g. Aurora, JCC, Collingwood IPx4 series) before final design freeze.
